title: Board Strategy Pitch
description: Fifteen minutes to the board — what you open with, what you cut, what you defend.
summary_pt_br: Pitch pro board: tese em uma linha, três números, pedido específico, respostas curtas, fechamento sem slides.

scenes.subtitle_en: Fifteen minutes to the board — what you open with, what you cut, what you defend.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Pitch pro board: tese em uma linha, três números, pedido específico, respostas curtas, fechamento sem slides.

scenes.text_en: Fifteen minutes to the board — what you open with, what you cut, what you defend. Focus: board strategy pitch. The board meets tomorrow. We have one shot and twelve minutes.
scenes.text_pt: Pitch pro board: tese em uma linha, três números, pedido específico, respostas curtas, fechamento sem slides. Foco: board strategy pitch. O board se reúne amanhã. Uma chance, doze minutos.

scenes.title: Board Strategy Pitch
scenes.body_en: Board pitch shape: OPEN with one-line thesis. PROOF in three numbers. ASK with specific timeline. Q&A answered in under 45 seconds. No slides for closing two minutes.
scenes.body_pt: Pitch pro board: tese em uma linha, três números, pedido específico, respostas curtas, fechamento sem slides.

examples.en: The board meets tomorrow. We have one shot and twelve minutes.
examples.pt: O board se reúne amanhã. Uma chance, doze minutos.

examples.en: Our thesis: margin, not growth, is the right metric this year.
examples.pt: Nossa tese: margem, não crescimento, é a métrica certa.

examples.en: If we cannot answer in 45 seconds, we haven't prepared enough.
examples.pt: Se não respondermos em 45s, não preparamos o bastante.

exercise.question: Complete: "The board meets ___. We have one shot and twelve minutes."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The board meets tomorrow. We have one shot and twelve minutes."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O board se reúne amanhã. Uma chance, doze minutos.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Our thesis: margin, not growth, is the right metric this year.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Our thesis: margin, not growth, is the right metric this year."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Nossa tese: margem, não crescimento, é a métrica certa.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Board Strategy Pitch — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre board strategy pitch. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca, your one-line thesis to the board.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Margin, not growth, is the right metric this year.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Give me your three proof numbers.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Revenue up 11%, margin up 7, headcount flat.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Twelve-month pricing freeze, board approval tomorrow.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: A director challenges your margin number.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Fair challenge. Short answer: we measure net margin.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We grow the business that pays us, not the one that doesn't.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Board pitches are won in the closing two minutes.

scenes.title: The board room
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the pitch's structure. Use at least three pitch terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the boardroom at nine in the morning, Joca walked into the most important fifteen minutes of his CEO year.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Our thesis is simple — margin, not growth, is the right metric for this particular year in this market.

paragraphs.speaker: Director
paragraphs.en: I want to see the three numbers that convince me before you go a single slide further into the pitch.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Revenue up eleven percent, margin up seven, headcount flat — and all three without new capital raised this year.

paragraphs.speaker: Director
paragraphs.en: Ask us for something specific. What do you need from this board before we leave the room today?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Board pitches, Joca understood, are won in the closing two minutes — where no slides protect you, only conviction.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Board Strategy Pitch". Fifteen minutes to the board — what you open with, what you cut, what you defend. The board meets tomorrow. We have one shot and twelve minutes. Our thesis: margin, not growth, is the right metric this year. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Board Strategy Pitch". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Board Strategy Pitch".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Board Strategy Pitch".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
